packet.implementation_strategy: One ambitious playable batch across Level02, Level03, and Level04. Update generation, validation, targeted smoke tests, regenerated scenes, route audit, and full build matrix together.

objects.name: L02 Pressure Bypass Rejoin Green Gauge
objects.placement: beside AUTH_L02_Door_PumpRoomExit as final route-open/rejoin signal

changes.risk: Extra labels can compete with the existing objective HUD if placed in the same view as pickups or combat targets.

objects.name: AUTH_L02_Hazard_SteamJet_C1_A
objects.adjustment: treat as teach vent; add warning gauge, visible idle/safe state, and safe approach pocket

objects.name: AUTH_L02_Hazard_PumpVent_R3_A
objects.adjustment: treat as execute vent; rotate/offset tell so damage cannot happen blind around the pump-room corner

objects.name: AUTH_L02_Hazard_ReturnVent_R4_A
objects.adjustment: optional combined vent only if a visible safe pocket exists before it

changes.risk: Adding a third vent may turn a readability polish pass into a damage-density increase; defer if route timing feels crowded.

objects.name: Enemy - L02 Pressure Bypass Scout A
objects.adjustment: keep before first vent as low-pressure movement read

objects.name: Enemy - L02 Pressure Bypass Ranged A
objects.adjustment: angle or offset to engage after first hazard tell and after cover becomes visible

objects.name: Enemy - L02 Pressure Bypass Exit Guard
objects.adjustment: keep near rejoin, after the rejoin marker is visible

changes.risk: A ranged enemy plus vent timing can create forced damage if cover is not placed before the first Lancer shot.

objects.name: TRG_L02_Secret_BoilerNiche
objects.adjustment: retain existing secret trigger and make it readable after two pressure tells

objects.name: L02 Pressure Bypass Secret Bleed Wheel Clue
objects.placement: near safe pocket after AUTH_L02_Hazard_PumpVent_R3_A, pointing toward secret service duct

objects.name: Pickup - L02 Secret Ammo Cache
objects.adjustment: keep optional and never required for route completion

objects.name: Pickup - L02 Secret Boiler Health
objects.adjustment: keep optional and near short return path

changes.risk: Secret clue can be mistaken for critical route guidance if it uses the same color/shape language as rejoin markers.
Too many labels in the furnace view can flatten progression into signage clutter.

objects.name: AUTH_L03_Hazard_FurnaceStrip_West
objects.adjustment: add preview strip before damage exposure

objects.name: AUTH_L03_Hazard_FurnaceStrip_East
objects.adjustment: preserve safe lane and keep hot color distinct from route marker color

objects.name: AUTH_L03_Hazard_SlagVent_R3_A
objects.adjustment: add visible safe preview angle before combat pressure

objects.name: L03 Gantry Breath Pocket Green Gauge
objects.placement: after Bellows Node platform and before rejoin stair

changes.risk: Warm furnace materials can hide danger tells if route markers also rely on amber/orange.

objects.name: Enemy - L03 Gantry Ranged Teacher
objects.adjustment: resolve naming/behavior mismatch; either rename as Scrapper pressure or promote to Lancer deliberately

objects.name: Enemy - L03 Gantry Detour Scrapper
objects.adjustment: keep off narrow catwalk and on wider detour platform

objects.name: Enemy - L03 Gantry Bellows Node
objects.adjustment: keep on control mezzanine/wide platform with cover and breath pocket before next precision movement

changes.risk: Promoting the teacher to a Lancer changes combat balance and must be tested beyond route readability.

objects.name: TRG_L03_Secret_CrucibleShelf
objects.adjustment: retain existing trigger and make it readable from upper gantry after height language is taught

objects.name: L03 Crucible Shelf Coolant Leak Clue
objects.placement: visible from GEO_L03_FoundryGantry_UpperCatwalk but away from mandatory rejoin label

objects.name: Pickup - L03 Secret Crucible Cache
objects.adjustment: keep optional and out of required rejoin path

changes.risk: A high secret can appear to be mandatory progression if the rejoin stair label is weak.
Observatory flavor labels can be mistaken for pump objectives unless objective labels use consistent wording.

objects.name: AUTH_L04_Hazard_Overpressure_R3
objects.adjustment: add pump-state reveal marker and safe preview before damage exposure

objects.name: AUTH_L04_Hazard_PressureJet_R4_North
objects.adjustment: keep readable from arena entry and avoid immediate damage after pump-state cue

objects.name: AUTH_L04_Hazard_PressureJet_R4_South
objects.adjustment: pair with visible safe pocket opposite north jet

objects.name: AUTH_L04_Hazard_GearSweep_R4_Deck
objects.adjustment: telegraph with floor strip and warning gauge before Bulwark pressure starts

changes.risk: Pressure jets, gear sweep, and Bulwark can overwhelm the arena if activated before route-open comprehension.

objects.name: Enemy - L04 Pumpworks Scout
objects.adjustment: keep early as a low-pressure orientation check

objects.name: Enemy - L04 Pumpworks Lancer
objects.adjustment: ensure engagement starts after Pump Primer read and visible cover

objects.name: Enemy - L04 Pumpworks Arena Bulwark
objects.adjustment: keep in vertical pump arena after Observatory Feed label and arena warning are visible

changes.risk: Bulwark combat smoke verifies combat behavior, but not whether the player understood pump-state routing before the fight.

objects.name: TRG_L04_Secret_ReturnDuct
objects.adjustment: retain existing trigger and signal it only after Pressure Return or Observatory Feed

objects.name: L04 Observatory Return Duct Gauge Clue
objects.placement: visible from observatory overlook, not from initial entry

objects.name: Pickup - L04 Secret Return Ammo
objects.adjustment: keep optional and return before next mandatory encounter/rejoin

changes.risk: If the clue is visible before pump-state language is established, the secret will feel arbitrary rather than mechanical.

recommended_main_lane_code_touchpoints.intent: Add route-polish helper calls inside existing Level02-Level04 route expansion builders; keep new objects under existing route roots.
Add ValidateV0153RoutePolish(sceneName) with required names and simple spatial checks.
Extend Level02 and Level03 route-order checks for labels, safe pockets, and breath pockets.
Optionally count route-polish labels/secret signals in Level02-Level04 as deterministic route audit notes.

uncertainties.note: The current route has pump-themed authority objects, but this packet does not confirm a real interactable pump objective chain. Treat L04 as readability/pacing polish unless main lane promotes those objects to gameplay.
Enemy - L03 Gantry Ranged Teacher is currently created through CreateEnemy, not CreateLancerEnemy. Main lane must resolve naming/behavior deliberately.
This packet polishes route-expansion secrets already present in the v0.1.51 root modules. It does not require increasing campaign secret totals.
